description_en: The four pseudo-fawasil in سورة الأعراف are serialized into two paired clusters rather than four neatly itemized lines.
impact_en: The four-item extraction is reliable, but it requires editorial splitting of the serialized phrasing.

description_en: The رؤوس الآي layer for سورة الأعراف is embedded directly after the entry prose and is not introduced by a separate heading node in the uploaded witness.
impact_en: The batch must split the inline ruʾūs logically from the entry before translation and structured extraction.

description_en: The first transmitted head, “للمؤمنين,” appears without a displayed numeral.
impact_en: The recovered ordinal layer treats this as verse-head 1 while preserving the witness’s lack of a displayed numeral.

description_en: The witness jumps from displayed 28 “مهتدون” to displayed 30 “المسرفين,” with no displayed 29 line.
impact_en: The recovered ordinal layer assigns “المسرفين” to ordinal 29 and records the displayed skip as a witness feature.

description_en: After displayed 37 “من النار,” the witness inserts an unnumbered “لا تعلمون” before displayed 38.
impact_en: The inserted head must be preserved explicitly as ordinal 37 in the recovered later-Madani sequence.

description_en: Displayed 136 breaks across the page boundary as a blank numeral fragment on printed 156, with the carried head “بني إسرائيل” at the top of printed 157; an unnumbered “يعرشون” then follows before displayed 137.
impact_en: The carried 136 head and the inserted “يعرشون” must be represented as two separate ordinals in the structured sequence.

description_en: The witness ends with a blank “٢٠٦” total line before the next sura begins.
impact_en: The terminal line is preserved as a display total only and is not treated as an additional head.

description_en: Because the inline witness begins unnumbered, skips displayed 29, inserts unnumbered heads after displayed 37 and after the carried 136 head, and ends with a blank total line, the displayed numerals do not function as a clean independent ordinal layer.
impact_en: The dataset stores recovered later-Madani ordinals together with witness display numbers where present.
